queries.dax: DEFINE VAR __DS0FilterTable = TREATAS({"Hospitalario"}, 'Tipo Cama'[Ámbito]) VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Sedes'[Ciudad])), NOT('Sedes'[Ciudad] IN {BLANK()})) VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = TREATAS({"CUBA", "K16", "MEGACENTRO", "UNINORTE"}, 'Sedes'[Sede]) VAR __DM3FilterTable = TREATAS({"ARMENIA", "MANIZALES", "PEREIRA", BLANK()}, 'Sedes'[Ciudad]) VAR __DS0Core = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('Sedes'[Ciudad], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal", 'Sedes'[Sede], "IsDM1Total", NONVISUAL(__DM3FilterTable), 'Tipo Cama'[Tipo], "IsDM3Total", NONVISUAL(__DM3FilterTable)), __DS0FilterTable, __DS0FilterTable2, __DS0FilterTable3, "v__Ocupación", 'Medidas'[% Ocupación], "Cant_Pacientes", 'Medidas'[Cant Pacientes], "Cant_Camas", 'Medidas'[Cant Camas], "Prom_Días_Estan", 'Medidas'[Prom Días Estan], "SumVlrCuenta", CALCULATE(SUM('SuperCenso'[VlrCuenta]))) VAR __DS0CoreTableByDM1 = SELECTCOLUMNS(KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), AND([IsDM1Total] = TRUE, [IsDM3Total] = TRUE))), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal", [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], "'Sedes'[Ciudad]", 'Sedes'[Ciudad], "SortBy_DM1_0", [v__Ocupación]) VAR __DS0CoreTableByDM3 = SELECTCOLUMNS(KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), [IsDM3Total] = TRUE)), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal", [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], "'Sedes'[Ciudad]", 'Sedes'[Ciudad], "IsDM1Total", [IsDM1Total], "'Sedes'[Sede]", 'Sedes'[Sede], "SortBy_DM3_0", [v__Ocupación]) VAR __DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns = NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(__DS0Core, __DS0CoreTableByDM1), __DS0CoreTableByDM3) VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = TOPN(502, __DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, [SortBy_DM1_0], 0, 'Sedes'[Ciudad], 1, [IsDM1Total], 0, [SortBy_DM3_0], 0, 'Sedes'[Sede], 1, [IsDM3Total], 0, [v__Ocupación], 0, 'Tipo Cama'[Tipo], 1) EVALUATE __DS0PrimaryWindowed ORDER BY [IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, [SortBy_DM1_0] DESC, 'Sedes'[Ciudad], [IsDM1Total] DESC, [SortBy_DM3_0] DESC, 'Sedes'[Sede], [IsDM3Total] DESC, [v__Ocupación] DESC, 'Tipo Cama'[Tipo]

queries.description: Tipo estancia por camas, pacientes y ocupación
queries.dax: DEFINE VAR __DS0FilterTable = TREATAS({"Hospitalario"}, 'Tipo Cama'[Ámbito]) VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Sedes'[Ciudad])), NOT('Sedes'[Ciudad] IN {BLANK()})) VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = TREATAS({"CUBA", "K16", "MEGACENTRO", "UNINORTE"}, 'Sedes'[Sede]) VAR __DS0Core = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('Tipo Cama'[Tipo], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"), __DS0FilterTable, __DS0FilterTable2, __DS0FilterTable3, "Cant_Camas", 'Medidas'[Cant Camas], "Cant_Pacientes", 'Medidas'[Cant Pacientes], "v__Ocupación", 'Medidas'[% Ocupación], "Prom_Días_Estan", 'Medidas'[Prom Días Estan]) VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'Tipo Cama'[Tipo], 1) EVALUATE __DS0PrimaryWindowed ORDER BY [IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'Tipo Cama'[Tipo]

queries.description: Tipo contrato por paciente, porcentaje y valor
queries.dax: DEFINE VAR __DS0FilterTable = TREATAS({"Hospitalario"}, 'Tipo Cama'[Ámbito]) VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Sedes'[Ciudad])), NOT('Sedes'[Ciudad] IN {BLANK()})) VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = TREATAS({"CUBA", "K16", "MEGACENTRO", "UNINORTE"}, 'Sedes'[Sede]) VAR __DS0Core = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('SuperCenso'[PGP], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"), __DS0FilterTable, __DS0FilterTable2, __DS0FilterTable3, "Cant_Pacientes", 'Medidas'[Cant Pacientes], "Porcentaje_Pacientes", DIVIDE('Medidas'[Cant Pacientes], CALCULATE('Medidas'[Cant Pacientes], ALLSELECTED('SuperCenso'[PGP]))), "SumVlrCuenta", CALCULATE(SUM('SuperCenso'[VlrCuenta]))) VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'SuperCenso'[PGP], 1) EVALUATE __DS0PrimaryWindowed ORDER BY [IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'SuperCenso'[PGP]

queries.description: Distribución de cuenta por pagar por aseguradora y modalidad
queries.dax: DEFINE VAR __DS0FilterTable = TREATAS({"Hospitalario"}, 'Tipo Cama'[Ámbito]) VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = TREATAS({"CUBA", "K16", "MEGACENTRO", "UNINORTE"}, 'Sedes'[Sede]) VAR __DS0Core = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('SuperCenso'[Entidad], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal", 'SuperCenso'[Regimen], "IsDM1Total"), __DS0FilterTable, __DS0FilterTable2, "SumVlrCuenta", CALCULATE(SUM('SuperCenso'[VlrCuenta])), "Cant_Pacientes", 'Medidas'[Cant Pacientes], "Porcentaje_Pacientes", DIVIDE('Medidas'[Cant Pacientes], CALCULATE('Medidas'[Cant Pacientes], ALLSELECTED('SuperCenso'[Entidad]), ALLSELECTED('SuperCenso'[Regimen])))) VAR __DS0CoreTableByDM1 = SELECTCOLUMNS(KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), [IsDM1Total] = TRUE)), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal", [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], "'SuperCenso'[Entidad]", 'SuperCenso'[Entidad], "SortBy_DM1_0", [SumVlrCuenta]) VAR __DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns = NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(__DS0Core, __DS0CoreTableByDM1) VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = TOPN(502, __DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, [SortBy_DM1_0], 0, 'SuperCenso'[Entidad], 1, [IsDM1Total], 0, [SumVlrCuenta], 0, 'SuperCenso'[Regimen], 1) EVALUATE __DS0PrimaryWindowed ORDER BY [IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, [SortBy_DM1_0] DESC, 'SuperCenso'[Entidad], [IsDM1Total] DESC, [SumVlrCuenta] DESC, 'SuperCenso'[Regimen]
